about.title: About Us
about.text1: We specialize in providing high-quality curated products, paying attention to every detail and craftsmanship. Each product undergoes strict screening to ensure it meets our high standards.
about.text2: We believe that good products speak for themselves, which is why we provide multiple-angle detail images, allowing you to fully understand every aspect of the product.
about.text3: Welcome to inquire through the contact methods below for more information, we will provide detailed answers.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.subtitle: Welcome to inquire about product details, we will reply as soon as possible
contact.instantText: Contact via Telegram or WeChat for quick response
contact.emailText: Send detailed requirements, we will carefully reply to every email

wechat.title: WeChat Contact
wechat.provideQR: Please provide your WeChat QR code
wechat.note: After scanning to add WeChat, please note "Product Inquiry"
